title: Dekton 3PC Nylon Brush Set | Includes End Brush, Wheel Brush and Cup Brush | Durable Wire Bristles | 75mm and 25mm Sizes | 6mm Shank Diameter | Ideal for Cleaning and Detailing
features: Versatile Brush Set: The Dekton 3PC Nylon Brush Set is designed for various cleaning and detailing tasks. This set includes one end brush (25mm), one wheel brush (75mm), and one cup brush (75mm), offering a comprehensive solution for tackling different surfaces. Whether you need to clean hard-to-reach areas or large surfaces, this set has the right brush for every job.

Durable Wire Bristles: Each brush in this set features high-quality nylon bristles that are tough on dirt but gentle on surfaces. The durability of the bristles ensures that they effectively remove grime, dust, and rust without damaging the underlying material. Perfect for both DIY projects and professional use, these brushes deliver reliable performance for all your cleaning needs.

Easy to Use: Designed with user-friendliness in mind, the brushes in this set have a standard 6mm shank diameter, making them compatible with most power tools. This allows for quick and easy attachment, enabling you to switch brushes effortlessly while working. Spend less time on setup and more time getting the job done efficiently.

Ideal for Various Applications: This nylon brush set is perfect for a range of applications, including cleaning metal parts, removing paint, and preparing surfaces for welding. Use the end brush for intricate details, the wheel brush for larger areas, and the cup brush for smooth surfaces.

Compact and Convenient: The Dekton 3PC Nylon Brush Set is lightweight and compact, making it easy to store and transport. With three essential brushes at your fingertips, you can tackle any cleaning task that comes your way. Keep your workspace organized and efficient with this versatile brush set, perfect for both home and professional use.
description: The Dekton 3PC Nylon Brush Set is your ultimate cleaning companion, designed for both home improvement enthusiasts and professionals. This set includes three essential brushes: an end brush (25mm), a wheel brush (75mm), and a cup brush (75mm), each featuring durable nylon bristles that effectively tackle dirt, grime, and rust without damaging surfaces. With a standard 6mm shank diameter, these brushes easily attach to most power tools, allowing for quick changes and effortless use. The end brush is perfect for reaching tight spots, the wheel brush is ideal for larger areas, and the cup brush is great for achieving a smooth finish on flat surfaces. Lightweight and compact, this brush set is easy to store and transport, making it a convenient addition to any toolkit. Whether you're cleaning metal parts, preparing surfaces for painting, or simply maintaining your tools, the Dekton 3PC Nylon Brush Set provides versatility and reliability for all your cleaning needs. Invest in this high-quality brush set and ensure your projects are completed with ease and precision!
